metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Choose a plan for your YouTube automation workflow.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Pick the credit plan that matches your research, script rewrite, storyboard, and production handoff volume.

items.title: Starter
features: 100 credits for reference analysis, script rewrites, and storyboard drafts
Reference notes, transcript breakdowns, and scene prompts
Production brief exports for editors and operators
One focused workflow for a faceless channel format
Email support
items.tip: Pay once. Ideal for pilots and one-off launches.

items.title: Standard
items.description: Support a growing team or agency workflow.
items.label: Popular
features: 200 credits with a 3-month runway
Reusable workflow templates for recurring formats
Shared handoff notes for writers, storyboarders, and editors
Priority queue for revisions and fresh generation runs
Deeper collaboration across research, writing, and editing
Priority email support
items.tip: Pay once. Best for active publishing teams.

items.title: Premium
features: 300 credits with a full-year validity window
Higher-volume planning for faceless channel operations
Advanced packaging for scripts, visual prompts, clips, and revision notes
Better visibility for reviews, approvals, and operator QA
Priority technical support
items.tip: Pay once. Built for agencies and multi-channel teams.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Keep one channel moving every month.
features: 100 monthly credits for research, rewrites, and storyboard work
Reference notes, transcript breakdowns, and scene prompts
Production brief exports for editors and operators
One focused workflow for a faceless channel format
Email support
items.tip: Pay monthly. Good for consistent experiments.

items.title: Standard
items.description: Support multiple creators or clients each month.
items.label: Popular
features: 200 monthly credits for active publishing cycles
Reusable workflow templates for recurring formats
Shared handoff notes for writers, storyboarders, and editors
Priority queue for revisions and fresh generation runs
Deeper collaboration across research, writing, and editing
Priority email support
items.tip: Pay monthly. Best for steady team output.

items.title: Premium
items.description: Run a high-volume operation with more headroom.
features: 300 monthly credits for larger production calendars
Higher-volume planning for faceless channel operations
Advanced packaging for scripts, visual prompts, clips, and revision notes
Better visibility for reviews, approvals, and operator QA
Priority technical support
items.tip: Pay monthly. Built for agencies with recurring demand.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Lower your cost for one channel over the year.
features: 1200 yearly credits for research, rewrites, and storyboard work
Reference notes, transcript breakdowns, and scene prompts
Production brief exports for editors and operators
One focused workflow for a faceless channel format
Email support
items.tip: Pay annually. Best value for one focused channel.

items.title: Standard
items.description: Give a growing team an annual content runway.
items.label: Popular
features: 2400 yearly credits for an active publishing calendar
Reusable workflow templates for recurring formats
Shared handoff notes for writers, storyboarders, and editors
Priority queue for revisions and fresh generation runs
Deeper collaboration across research, writing, and editing
Priority email support
items.tip: Pay annually. Best for teams with a repeatable schedule.

items.title: Premium
items.description: Operate multiple channels or client pods across the year.
features: 3600 yearly credits for high-volume planning and revisions
Higher-volume planning for faceless channel operations
Advanced packaging for scripts, visual prompts, clips, and revision notes
Better visibility for reviews, approvals, and operator QA
Priority technical support
items.tip: Pay annually. Built for agencies and multi-channel teams.
